meaning: mode/condition prefix for following 4F block. Only seen here with 4F 02 23 19, so exact mnemonic unknown.
references WRAM $1923 and table CB:0364. Likely common validity/effect-context check before default selector.
second $1923/table CB:0364 based check. Same family as block A, but terminal byte C0.
very common prefix before A4 selector writes. Likely evaluates/normalizes effect condition.
sets effect selector/result to 00, likely no-effect/fallback before branch selection.
selects between selector 00 and selector 01. Branch unit/condition still unknown.
sets default selector/result to 01. Standard weapon effect selector.
commits selected result or exits current conditional block before final return.
